meaning: (=postscript)附言,附录,跋 /[计] IBM 推出的一种计算机
examples: PS Could you send me your fax number again?
She added a PS asking me to water the plants.
PS Please show your friends this letter and the enclosed leaflet.
Verify which PS Vita card you are using by looking at the home screen's info bar.
The PS Vita already has voice chat and text chat through its built-in Party application.
